# Reduce expert outputs back to token order

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This mixture-of-experts translation keeps routing scores, indices, counts, and expert values in tile operations.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/moe/reduce_fused_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/moe/reduce_fused_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `reduce_fused` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="reduce_fused_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
void reduce_fused(DTypeIn *x, float *topk_weights,
                  std::int32_t *token_topk_to_pos, DTypeOut *out) {
    static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && Hidden > 0 && NumTopk > 0 && NumExpanded > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(TileW % 8 == 0, "TileW must be multiple of 8");
    constexpr int kTiles = Hidden / TileW;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_in  = global_tensor<DTypeIn,  RowMajor<NumExpanded, Hidden>>;
    using gm_out = global_tensor<DTypeOut, RowMajor<NumTokens,  Hidden>>;
    using tile_in = LocalTile< DTypeIn,  1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_f  = LocalTile< float,    1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_o  = LocalTile< DTypeOut, 1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using it_in = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_in>;
    using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_o>;
    it_in in_iter(x); it_out out_iter(out);
    for (int n = 0; n < NumTokens; ++n) {
        for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) {
            tile_f acc, xf, wf; tile_in xq; tile_o oq;
            TEXPANDS(acc, 0.0f);
            for (int k = 0; k < NumTopk; ++k) {
                int pos = token_topk_to_pos[n * NumTopk + k];
                if (pos >= 0) {
                    float w = topk_weights[n * NumTopk + k];
                    auto gx = in_iter(pos, t);
                    TLOAD(xq, gx);
                    TCVT(xf, xq);
                    TMULS(wf, xf, w);
                    TADD(acc, acc, wf);
                }
            }
            TCVT(oq, acc);
            auto gout = out_iter(n, t);
            TSTORE(gout, oq);
        }
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load a routing fragment, apply selection, counting, normalization, gather, or reduction stages, and store the fragment in token-major or expert-major order.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TADD`](../../../intrinsics/tadd.md), [`TCVT`](../../../intrinsics/tcvt.md), [`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition tokens or experts; threads own disjoint routing fragments of at least 128 bytes and derive their coordinates from execution identity.

## Memory and tile flow

Scores and indices are loaded into typed tiles, transformed through the routing pipeline, and committed through regular or indexed tile memory operations.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

## Complete translated source

??? code "reduce_fused_pto.hpp"

    ```cpp title="reduce_fused_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_REDUCE_FUSED_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_REDUCE_FUSED_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <typename DTypeIn, typename DTypeOut, int NumTokens, int Hidden,
              int NumTopk, int NumExpanded, int TileW = 16>
    void reduce_fused(DTypeIn *x, float *topk_weights,
                      std::int32_t *token_topk_to_pos, DTypeOut *out) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && Hidden > 0 && NumTopk > 0 && NumExpanded > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(TileW % 8 == 0, "TileW must be multiple of 8");
        constexpr int kTiles = Hidden / TileW;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_in  = global_tensor<DTypeIn,  RowMajor<NumExpanded, Hidden>>;
        using gm_out = global_tensor<DTypeOut, RowMajor<NumTokens,  Hidden>>;
        using tile_in = LocalTile< DTypeIn,  1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_f  = LocalTile< float,    1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_o  = LocalTile< DTypeOut, 1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using it_in = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_in>;
        using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_o>;
        it_in in_iter(x); it_out out_iter(out);
        for (int n = 0; n < NumTokens; ++n) {
            for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) {
                tile_f acc, xf, wf; tile_in xq; tile_o oq;
                TEXPANDS(acc, 0.0f);
                for (int k = 0; k < NumTopk; ++k) {
                    int pos = token_topk_to_pos[n * NumTopk + k];
                    if (pos >= 0) {
                        float w = topk_weights[n * NumTopk + k];
                        auto gx = in_iter(pos, t);
                        TLOAD(xq, gx);
                        TCVT(xf, xq);
                        TMULS(wf, xf, w);
                        TADD(acc, acc, wf);
                    }
                }
                TCVT(oq, acc);
                auto gout = out_iter(n, t);
                TSTORE(gout, oq);
            }
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
    ```
